baseline.method: Tensor-Var 4D-Var (deep kernel feature space, identity Q/R/B fallback)

nrmse_definition: RMS error between estimate and reference normalised by the dynamic range (max - min) of the reference, computed independently per channel.
weighted_nrmse_definition: For each channel c and timestep t, weighted_nrmse[t,c] = ||(est - true) * lat_weight||_2 / ||true * lat_weight||_2 where lat_weight is the cosine-latitude weighting matrix shipped in raw_data.npz. The reported per-channel value is the mean over the assimilation window.
